summary: MiraCuratedLayer refactor testing complete. All 10 pillar pages (Care, Travel, Stay, Learn, Enjoy, Fit, Paperwork, Advisory, Shop, Services) successfully render MiraCuratedLayer with pillar-specific theming when user is logged in. Found 3 backend API issues for newly updated pillars (paperwork, advisory, services) returning 'Invalid pillar' error.

minor.issue: Returns 'Invalid pillar: paperwork' - backend needs to support paperwork pillar
Returns 'Invalid pillar: advisory' - backend needs to support advisory pillar
Returns 'Invalid pillar: services' - backend needs to support services pillar
WebSocket connections intermittently failing with 1006 errors but reconnecting. Non-blocking.

integration_issues.issue: Console error: [CuratedConciergeSection] Error: Failed to fetch curated set - 400 response for unsupported pillars

action_items: Backend: Add 'paperwork', 'advisory', 'services' to supported pillars in /api/mira/curated-set/{petId}/{pillar} endpoint
Backend: Create concierge cards for paperwork, advisory, services pillars (similar to care_concierge_cards.py)
critical_code_review_comments: MiraCuratedLayer component correctly implements null render when activePet or token is missing (line 268-271)
All 10 pillar pages correctly integrate MiraCuratedLayer with consistent props pattern
Frontend error handling in CuratedConciergeSection gracefully handles API failures
Pillar-specific theming (PILLAR_THEMES) correctly defines colors, icons, and copy for all 12 pillars including paperwork/advisory/services/shop

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 10 pillar pages render MiraCuratedLayer correctly with personalization)

context_for_next_testing_agent: MiraCuratedLayer component successfully unified across all pillar pages. Backend API needs update to support paperwork/advisory/services pillars for CuratedConciergeSection to display cards. Frontend gracefully handles API failures.

mobile_viewport_testing.responsive_design: PASS - all pages render correctly on mobile
mobile_viewport_testing.touch_targets: PASS - buttons and interactive elements properly sized
mobile_viewport_testing.spacing: PASS - appropriate mobile spacing and padding
